summary: Smarter news with mood-aware summaries, plus Dashboard alerts when new email arrives.

introduced: News feed analyzes each headline for mood — uplifting, informative, analytical, concerning, or breaking — with color-coded cards and a plain-language summary
Each news story includes a short mood explanation so you know why it feels urgent, concerning, or positive before you open it
Dashboard modal when new email arrives while you are on the Dashboard — shows the count, a preview, and Open inbox to jump straight to mail
Unread email in the Summary metrics box is highlighted in yellow whenever you have mail waiting
changed: News summaries are rewritten for everyday readers — In brief explains what happened and why it matters
Apple Intelligence improves news summaries and mood notes when available, with smart fallbacks offline
New email alerts queue while you are away from the Dashboard and appear when you return
